walkforward_spec.standardization_rule: fit StandardScaler on the training window only at each refit
walkforward_spec.pca_rule: fit PCA on the training-window standardized features only at each refit
walkforward_spec.cluster_fit_rule: fit KMeans on the training-window PCA embedding only at each refit
walkforward_spec.ordering_rule: re-label raw clusters from lowest to highest training-window mean spy_ret_1d
walkforward_spec.signal_definition: For date t, export the ordered cluster label assigned by the past-only scaler/PCA/KMeans fit to same-day features x_t. Any trading rule must lag this label to date t+1.
